payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Beige/cream pleated fabric lampshade with scalloped lower rim over a turned dark-brown base (appears to be wood or ceramic); lamp is lit with a warm yellow glow and the lower/side of the base is partially cropped by the image border — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"table lamp","short_description":"beige pleated shade table lamp","long_description":"Beige/cream pleated fabric lampshade with scalloped lower rim over a turned dark-brown base (appears to be wood or ceramic); lamp is lit with a warm yellow glow and the lower/side of the base is partially cropped by the image border — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["beige/cream pleated fabric shade","scalloped lower rim","warm yellow light (on)","turned dark-brown base (wood or ceramic)","bottom partially cropped","slight side/edge crop"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
